chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 5885 of 2017 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of Misc. No.24459/2017 3. For hearing of Misc. No.24463/2017 4. For hearing of main case 27.01.2025 Mr. Ahmed Ali Hussain, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Masooda Siraj, advocate for respondent Ms. Alizeh Bashir, Assistant Attorney General Under instructions learned counsel for the petitioner submits that he may be permitted to withdraw this petition while remained at liberty to seek recourse in accordance with law. Petition stands disposed off accordingly. Judge Judge Amjad
